creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
Update libkate to 0.4.1

NOTES:
- ports depending on libkate should chase libkate.4
- added a new option to make KateDJ working (on) or python optional (off,default) - having the new option on, leads to a HUGE depends-list, I hope that the warning is enough

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
